utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. The final coverage plan includes all 5 corresponding sections. Now check if each is fully specified with all required details: (1) health_coverage requires physical and mental health insurance with costs. Plan provides provider, policy number, monthly cost, and details including mental health sessions—meets requirement. (2) property_coverage requires home/contents insurance with costs. Plan provides provider, policy number, monthly cost, and coverage details—meets requirement. (3) travel_coverage requires travel insurance with costs. Plan provides provider, policy number, monthly cost, and coverage details—meets requirement. (4) additional_services requires any enhancement services with costs. The plan lists services but does not list explicit costs for these services; some are stated as included, but not costed individually—arguably lacks explicit costs. Thus, not fully specified. (5) total_budget requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. Plan provides monthly cost, annual cost, and some extras—meets requirement. Therefore, 4 out of 5 items are fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan lists three specific LifeFirst policies: LifeFirst Standard Health Plan, LifeFirst Standard Home Content Coverage, and LifeFirst Standard Travel Insurance. These correspond to items in the ground-truth under primary_health_coverage.physical_health (LifeFirst Standard Plan), property_protection.home_content (LifeFirst Standard Coverage), and mobility_coverage.travel_insurance (LifeFirst Standard Plan). The exact names in the ratings are slightly different from the plan labels, but they clearly map to the LifeFirst Standard options in each category. Their corresponding ratings are 9 (health), 9 (home content), and 9 (travel). No separate mental health, add-ons, or enhancement services are explicitly purchased as standalone items in the final plan, so only these three need ratings.
